assertions.title: Tile reassembly combines $636 grid into single image

steps.expected: 2×2 grid of 50×50 tiles produces 100×100 combined PNG image
steps.observed: PASS — 100×100 combined image decoded successfully from $284 (PNG) format output

steps.expected: Missing tile raw media logs error and returns nil
steps.observed: PASS — error logged: 'Resource test_resource is missing tile (1, 0): tile-0-1', rawMedia returned nil

steps.observed: PASS — non-nil raw media produced with blank tile substitution

summary: Tested 11 assertions: all 11 passed. All tests exist, cover the described behaviors, and pass. Test suite includes 20 test functions covering tile reassembly (7 tests), JXR conversion (2 tests), PDF extraction (3 tests), URI resolution (3 tests), and variant selection (4 tests), plus integration tests.
